evidence.scientific_clarity: All brief requirements met: ~80-point scatter, OLS line, slope/intercept/R² annotated in-figure, OursModel star-marked with arrow label.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 set; PDF confirms /Subtype /Type3 for DejaVuSans, DejaVuSans-Bold, DejaVuSansMono — text is bitmapped and non-editable; default DejaVu Sans used throughout.
evidence.palette: Blue (#4C72B0) and orange (#E07B2A) are CB-safe; red (#DD4444) for OursModel is problematic for deuteranopes/protanopes, though used for a single emphasis point rather than a category.
evidence.layout_density: 5.5×4.2 in with tight_layout(); legend upper-left, stats box upper-right, OursModel annotation with offset arrow — no crowding or gaping whitespace evident.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure content exactly; legend placed inside axes; numerical slope, intercept, and R² appear both in-figure and in caption; OursModel coordinates specified.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF exists (32 kB) but all fonts are /Subtype /Type3 (bitmapped glyphs) because pdf.fonttype=42 was never set — text is not selectable or searchable.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (32 kB), figure.png (62 kB), figure.svg (62 kB), caption.tex (343 B), gen_figure.py (2.5 kB) all present and non-trivial; data.json is an input, not a required output.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption names the dataset (80 runs), identifies the OLS line, gives exact equation and R²=0.877, and pinpoints OursModel coordinates — a specific numerical finding is clearly stated.

overall_strengths: Complete scientific content: scatter, OLS fit, in-figure stats annotation, and emphasized OursModel point all implemented as specified in the brief.
High-quality caption with precise numerical claims (slope, intercept, R², OursModel coordinates) that directly match the figure.
overall_weaknesses: Missing pdf.fonttype=42 (and svg.fonttype=0): all text in the PDF is embedded as Type 3 bitmapped glyphs, making it non-selectable and unsuitable for journal submission.
Default DejaVu Sans font used with no explicit font family override; red (#DD4444) for OursModel is not fully colorblind-safe for red-green deficient viewers.
